sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: SNOA) closes $4M stock and warrant sale
feed.summary: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals has closed a public unit offering, raising approximately $3.5 million in net proceeds after expenses. The offering included units of common stock or pre-funded warrants, complemented by common stock purchase warrants, with each unit priced at $1.35. The funds are earmarked for general corporate purposes and working capital.

feed.title: [8-K] SPS COMMERCE INC Reports Material Event
feed.summary: SPS Commerce (SPSC) filed an 8-K report detailing its Q1 2026 financial results, with revenue growing 6% to $192.1 million and Adjusted EBITDA increasing 7% to $57.9 million. While GAAP net income decreased, non-GAAP diluted EPS improved, and the company repurchased $47.1 million in stock. SPS Commerce also announced the launch of MAX, a new AI capability for supply chain workflows, and provided Q2 and full-year 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (SNDX) Syndax Pharmaceuticals Posts Q1 Loss $0.48, vs. FactSet Est of $0.61 Loss
feed.summary: Syndax Pharmaceuticals (SNDX) reported a Q1 loss of $0.48 per share, which is better than FactSet's estimated loss of $0.61 per share. The company is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm focused on developing cancer therapies, with product candidates including revumenib and axatilimab. They also reported Q1 revenue of $64.9 million, falling short of FactSet's estimate of $69.8 million.

feed.title: [8-K] Syndax Pharmaceuticals Inc Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Syndax Pharmaceuticals Inc. reported a significant increase in Q1 2026 revenue, reaching $64.9 million, a 224% year-over-year jump, primarily driven by strong launches of their drugs Revuforj and Niktimvo. Despite remaining loss-making, the company significantly narrowed its net loss to $42.7 million from $84.8 million a year prior. Syndax projects a path to profitability, anticipating its current cash, investments, and revenue streams will sufficiently cover operating expenses for 2026.

feed.title: Non-operating income (total) of SIFCO Industries, Inc. – TRADEGATE:SI7
feed.summary: This article displays the non-operating income (total) for SIFCO Industries, Inc. under the TRADEGATE:SI7 ticker. It provides financial data and indicates that the market for this stock is currently closed. The content is presented in a data table format, showing the period, value, change, and percentage change.

feed.title: [ARS] Synergy CHC Corp. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC filing (Form ARS) by Synergy CHC Corp. (SNYR) on April 30, 2026, at 4:18 PM. The filing is categorized with low impact and neutral sentiment, and a PDF document is available for viewing. The article also provides a brief overview of SNYR's stock, market cap ranking, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Massive equity plan, warrant and reverse split up for Synergy CHC (SNYR) vote
feed.summary: Synergy CHC Corp. (SNYR) is seeking stockholder approval for several key proposals at its 2026 virtual annual meeting on June 29, 2026. These include electing directors, ratifying auditors, significantly increasing its 2024 Equity Incentive Plan share reserve to 150,000,000 common shares and allowing repricing of awards, approving the full issuance of shares under a Lender Warrant for Nasdaq compliance, and authorizing a reverse stock split at a ratio of up to 1-for-200. These proposals aim to increase capital flexibility, maintain Nasdaq listing, and align executive and stockholder interests, despite potential dilution concerns and a reported net loss of $(12.3) million in 2025.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Reyna Thompson Sells Shares of TD Synnex Corp (SNX)
feed.summary: Reyna Thompson, President, North America at TD Synnex Corp (SNX), sold 2,196 shares of the company on April 29, 2026. This transaction is part of a broader trend of insider selling at TD Synnex, with 39 insider sells and no buys over the past year. The stock is currently priced at $223.47 and is considered significantly overvalued based on its GF Value of $148.24.

feed.title: SiTime Corp (SITM) Shares Surge 6.6% -- What GF Score of 77 Tells Investors
feed.summary: SiTime Corp (SITM) shares surged 6.6% to $562.15, but GuruFocus's GF Value™ suggests the stock is significantly overvalued by 90.4% compared to its intrinsic value of $295.26. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 77/100, driven by excellent Financial Strength and Momentum, the company struggles with low Profitability and Valuation scores. Adding to concerns, insiders have sold $13.2 million worth of shares in the last three months, with no buying activity, indicating a potential lack of insider confidence.

feed.title: Insider at TD SYNNEX (NYSE: SNX) sells 2,196 common shares
feed.summary: Reyna Thompson, President, North America at TD SYNNEX (NYSE: SNX), reported selling 2,196 shares of common stock on April 29, 2026. The sales, totaling approximately $490,733, were executed in three tranches at weighted average prices between $222.39 and $224.27 per share. These transactions were made under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on January 28, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 1.73M SLAB shares (5.23%) — SLAB (NASDAQ: SLAB)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported beneficial ownership of 1,725,524 shares of Silicon Laboratories Inc. (NASDAQ: SLAB), representing a 5.23% stake in the company as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G filing, which indicates a passive institutional investment rather than an intent to influence management. The filing details Vanguard's sole voting power for 252,194 shares and sole dispositive power for all 1,725,524 beneficially owned shares.

feed.title: Brera Holdings Delays Annual 20-F Yearly Report
feed.summary: Brera Holdings PLC Class B announced a delay in filing its annual Form 20-F (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The delay is attributed to unexpected holdups in receiving financial data from its sports clubs, necessary for audit finalization and consolidation. The company expects to file the report within the standard 15-calendar-day extension period and anticipates no significant change in its results from the prior year.

feed.title: 8-K] Schneider National, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Schneider National, Inc. (NYSE: SNDR) reported its Q1 2026 earnings, with operating revenues remaining flat at $1.40 billion compared to 2025, while net income and diluted EPS decreased due to margin pressures across all segments. Despite weaker profits, the company generated strong free cash flow and reaffirmed its full-year 2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance of $0.70-$1.00 and net capital expenditures of $400-$450 million. Management

feed.title: From alcohol tech to AI power: SOBRsafe proposes zero-carbon deal
feed.summary: SOBRsafe has entered into a definitive agreement to combine its alcohol monitoring business with Clean World Ventures (CWV), a zero-carbon green energy technology manufacturer. CWV will own approximately 98% of the combined public company, with the deal expected to close in Q3 2026, subject to approvals. The transaction includes pre-close third-party financing of $5.5 million for SOBRsafe, and CWV aims to provide on-site, zero-carbon power for AI/data centers using wastewater and scrap aluminum as feedstock.

feed.title: SOBRsafe (NASDAQ: SOBR) to give CWV 98% stake in merger
feed.summary: SOBRsafe announced a definitive agreement for a business combination with Clean World Ventures, Inc. (CWV), a zero-carbon green energy technology manufacturer. Upon closing, CWV will own approximately 98% of the public combined company, which will operate under the Clean World Ventures name. The transaction, targeted for Q3 2026, involves $5.5 million in third-party financing, with SOBRsafe's alcohol monitoring business continuing to operate independently.

feed.title: As Sleep Number Secures $55 Million in Liquidity, a Major SNBR Stock Short Squeeze Could Be Brewing
feed.summary: Sleep Number (SNBR) has secured $55 million in additional liquidity, including a $25 million term loan, and received covenant relief, potentially setting the stage for a short squeeze. This financial lifeline comes as the company's new ComfortMode mattress is significantly exceeding sales expectations, and management has successfully implemented cost reductions. Despite anticipated near-term sales declines and ongoing refinancing evaluations, analysts predict significant free cash flow improvement and potential stock appreciation if current trends continue.

feed.title: SM Energy completes $950 million South Texas asset sale, to redeem debt
feed.summary: SM Energy (NYSE: SM) has completed the sale of certain South Texas assets for $950 million, resulting in net proceeds of approximately $900 million. The company plans to use these funds to redeem $819 million of its 2026 Senior Notes. This strategic move aims to strengthen its balance sheet and follows a successful semi-annual borrowing base redetermination.

feed.title: Summit Therapeutics (NASDAQ: SMMT) posts larger Q1 loss amid cash burn and trials
feed.summary: Summit Therapeutics (NASDAQ: SMMT) reported a significantly larger net loss of $189.4 million in Q1 2026, compared to $62.9 million in the prior year, primarily due to increased research and development expenses for its lead cancer drug ivonescimab and higher stock-based compensation. The company's cash and short-term investments of $598.7 million as of March 31, 2026, are deemed insufficient to fund operations for at least one year, raising substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern. The FDA has accepted the Biologics License Application for ivonescimab, with a PDUFA date of November 14, 2026, but has indicated that a statistically significant overall survival benefit will be necessary for potential approval.

feed.title: Silgan (NYSE:SLGN) Price Target Lowered to $54.00 at Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup lowered its price target for Silgan (NYSE:SLGN) from $56.00 to $54.00 while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 32.38% upside. The adjustment follows Silgan's Q1 results, which surpassed expectations with EPS of $0.78 and revenue of $1.56 billion, and the company issued Q2 and FY26 guidance largely in line with consensus. Analyst sentiment remains mixed, with some firms raising price targets and others trimming them, resulting in a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target price of $52.44.

feed.title: SKBL (NASDAQ: SKBL) to combine with Cove Kaz, creating Kaz Resources Inc.
feed.summary: Skyline Builders Group Holding Limited (SKBL) has entered into an agreement to combine with Cove Kaz Capital Group LLC, creating a new entity named Kaz Resources Inc. The transaction involves a multi-step merger, equity exchanges, and an earnout structure. Cove Kaz brings significant critical mineral assets in Kazakhstan, including tungsten and rare earth projects, aligning with SKBL's strategic shift from construction to critical materials supply to the U.S. market.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NASDAQ: SIDU) reports 3.76M shares (5.66%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 3,759,744 shares, or 5.66%, of Sidus Space Inc. common stock as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G SEC filing, indicating a passive investment. Vanguard holds sole voting power over 399,319 shares and sole dispositive power over all 3,759,744 shares, managed across various Vanguard funds and accounts.

feed.title: SIM Acquisition Reschedules Meeting to Extend SPAC Deadline
feed.summary: SIM Acquisition Corp. I has rescheduled its shareholder meeting to May 7, 2026, to vote on extending its business combination deadline to July 12, 2027. The deadline for shareholders to exercise redemption rights has been moved to May 5, 2026. This extension is crucial for the SPAC's ability to secure a transaction.

feed.title: SIM Acquisition Corp. I (NASDAQ: SIMA) delays shareholder vote on extension
feed.summary: SIM Acquisition Corp. I (SIMA) has announced a postponement of its extraordinary general meeting to May 7, 2026, where shareholders will vote on an Extension Amendment Proposal. This proposal seeks to extend the deadline for completing an initial business combination from July 11, 2026, to July 12, 2027. The deadline for shareholders to exercise redemption rights in connection with this vote has also been moved to May 5, 2026.

feed.title: CSN announces its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025
feed.summary: CSN (Companhia Siderurgica Nacional S.A.) has announced the filing of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. This information was released via Quantisnow, a platform providing real-time market data to retail investors. The report is crucial for investors tracking the company's financial performance.

feed.title: [Form 4] Shimmick Corp Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Shimmick Corp's Chief Operating Officer, Sarah Beth Tacker, has been granted two new Restricted Stock Unit (RSU) awards, totaling 88,652 RSUs and 26,596 RSUs. These RSUs will vest and convert into common stock based on her continued service, with vesting dates in May 2026 and April 2027. This insider activity indicates equity compensation rather than direct stock purchases or sales.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (RYTM) files Schedule 13G for 5.02% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing a 5.02% beneficial ownership stake in Rhythm Pharmaceuticals Inc. The filing indicates Vanguard beneficially owned 3,432,949 shares of common stock as of March 31, 2026, with sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 465,124 shares. This passive investment disclosure suggests institutional ownership rather than an active acquisition attempt, as indicated by the Schedule 13G type.

feed.title: Septerna (NASDAQ: SEPN) details 2026 vote on directors and auditor
feed.summary: Septerna, Inc. (NASDAQ: SEPN) has issued a definitive proxy statement (DEF 14A) detailing the agenda for its upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. The virtual-only meeting will be held on June 26, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time, where shareholders will vote on the election of two Class II directors and the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026. The board of directors recommends voting "FOR" both proposals.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 3.8M SL Green shares (NYSE: SLG), 5.34% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 5.34% passive stake in SL Green Realty Corp. (NYSE: SLG), holding 3,795,005 shares. This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G filing, indicating that Vanguard has sole voting power over 589,791 shares and sole dispositive power over all 3,795,005 shares. The filing underscores Vanguard's role as a significant institutional investor in SL Green.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 2.04M shares in Signet (NYSE: SIG) per Schedule 13G

feed.title: GRUPO SIMEC ANNOUNCES RESULTS OF OPERATIONS FOR THE TWELVE-MONTH PERIOD ENDED DECEMBER 31, 2025.
feed.summary: Grupo Simec S.A.B. de C.V. (SIM) announced its results of operations for the twelve-month period ended December 31, 2025. This press release was distributed by Quantisnow, a real-time market data and news platform specializing in aggregating financial information for retail investors.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Investors with Losses on their Investment in SES AI Corporation of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadlines - SES
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against SES AI Corporation (NYSE: SES) on behalf of investors who incurred losses. The lawsuit alleges securities fraud and other unlawful business practices, stemming from a Wolfpack Research report accusing SES AI of "phantom deals" and concerns regarding an acquisition and joint venture. Investors who purchased SES AI securities during the class period have until June 26, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff appointment.

feed.title: Tanger Inc. (NYSE:SKT) Smashes Q1 Estimates, Boosts Guidance Amid Retail Rebound
feed.summary: Tanger Inc. (NYSE:SKT) significantly beat Q1 analyst estimates for Core FFO and revenue, reporting $0.59 per share versus a $0.31 estimate, driven by strong occupancy and tenant sales. The company also raised its full-year 2026 FFO guidance and increased its quarterly dividend. This positive performance reflects a strong rebound in physical retail, with shares gaining in after-market trading.

feed.title: A pharma company strikes Dogecoin mining deal backed by $11M PIPE
feed.summary: Shuttle Pharmaceuticals (SHPH) has announced a definitive merger agreement to acquire United Dogecoin, a Dogecoin mining company. The merger, supported by an $11 million PIPE financing, aims to create the world's largest publicly listed Dogecoin mining company based on global hashrate percentage. United Dogecoin plans to acquire up to 3,000 ElphaPex mining rigs, significantly expanding its mining capacity, and its CEO, Ryan Trasolini, will become co-CEO of the combined entity.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges SES AI Corporation Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against SES AI Corporation (NYSE: SES) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between January 29, 2025, and March 4, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that SES AI made false and misleading statements about its business prospects, revenue generation, and growth, failing to disclose material logistics constraints and lower-than-expected revenue guidance. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to join the case by June 26, 2026, and can contact the firm for more information.

feed.title: [8-K] TANGER INC. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Tanger Inc. reported strong first-quarter 2026 results and raised its full-year outlook, with net income rising to $28.1 million and FFO increasing to $0.59 per share. The company achieved 97.0% occupancy and a 2.6% increase in Same Center NOI, demonstrating healthy operational performance and successful leasing efforts. Tanger also increased its annualized dividend by 6.8% to $1.25 per share and completed significant financing transactions, enhancing its liquidity to over $1 billion.

feed.title: SI-BONE To Present at BofA Securities 2026 Healthcare Conference on May 12, 2026
feed.summary: SI-BONE (Nasdaq: SIBN) announced it will participate in the BofA Securities 2026 Healthcare Conference in Las Vegas, NV, on Tuesday, May 12, 2026. Management will host a fireside chat at 8:00 a.m. PT / 11:00 a.m. ET, with live audio available via webcast on the company’s investor relations page. The webcast will also be archived for at least 90 days for replay.

feed.title: Sprouts Farmers Market Q1 2026 Earnings: $2.3B Sales, 4% Growth, and Strategic Priorities - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Sprouts Farmers Market reported Q1 2026 sales of $2.3 billion, a 4% increase year-over-year, driven by new store performance despite a 1.7% decline in comparable store sales and cautious consumer spending. The company's CEO, Jack Sinclair, outlined key priorities for 2026, including enhancing differentiation, improving in-store experience, accelerating customer engagement, and expanding through new stores. CFO Curtis Valentine noted a slight dip in gross margin due to loyalty investments and shrink performance, with strategic actions being taken to improve affordability.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Issues Positive Forecast for Sprouts Farmers Market (NASDAQ:SFM) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target for Sprouts Farmers Market (SFM) from $77 to $78, maintaining a "neutral" rating despite predicting a slight downside. This follows Sprouts beating Q1 EPS estimates but providing cautious FY2026 guidance due to margin pressure and weaker comparable-store traffic. The overall analyst consensus is a "Hold" with an average price target of $96.08, while insiders have recently sold a significant number of shares.

feed.title: Sprouts cuts prices on coffee and other essentials to boost customer visits amid inflation
feed.summary: Sprouts Farmers Market is lowering prices on essential items, including coffee, to attract more customers in response to rising inflation. The company is testing these price reductions across different markets and promoting its loyalty program, having recently reported first-quarter revenue of $2.33 billion.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 5.03M Sprouts shares (SFM) — 5.31% stake disclosed
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 5,028,374 shares of Sprouts Farmers Market Inc. (SFM), constituting a 5.31% stake in the company. This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G filing, indicating a passive investment. Vanguard exercises sole dispositive power over these shares, and the filing provides detailed insights into their ownership and regulatory compliance.

feed.title: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of Sun Life Financial Inc. and Its Subsidiaries
feed.summary: AM Best has affirmed the credit ratings for Sun Life Financial Inc. (SLF) and its key subsidiaries, including Sun Life Assurance Company of Canada and Sun Life and Health Insurance Company (U.S.), maintaining a stable outlook. The ratings reflect Sun Life Group’s strongest balance sheet strength, strong operating performance, favorable business profile, and very strong enterprise risk management. Additionally, ratings were affirmed for Independence Life and Annuity Company and Professional Insurance Company, with their respective balance sheet strengths and operational profiles considered.

feed.title: SEI Investments (SEIC) officer exercises options, sells 4,000 shares
feed.summary: Mark Andrew Warner, an officer at SEI Investments (SEIC), exercised stock options to acquire 4,000 shares of common stock at $48.47 per share and subsequently sold all 4,000 shares on the open market at $91.16 per share. These transactions, reported on April 28, 2026, were compensation-related, stemming from equity-based pay. After these sales, Warner directly holds 921 shares of SEIC common stock, resulting in a net sale of 4,000 shares with a total value of $364,640.

feed.title: Sei investments Co. chief accounting officer sells $364,640 stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Mark Andrew Warner, Chief Accounting Officer at SEI Investments Co., sold 4,000 shares for $364,640 on April 28, 2026, after acquiring an equal number of shares through stock options. Despite the sale, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, and the company has a 38-year dividend payment history. This news follows strong Q1 2026 earnings for SEI Investments, with analysts raising price targets due to robust core earnings and sales wins.

feed.title: Sezzle (NASDAQ: SEZL) updates governance, executive pay and ownership
feed.summary: Sezzle Inc. filed an amendment to its 2025 Annual Report to include detailed information on its directors, executive compensation, ownership, and auditor matters, which was previously omitted. The company reported a net income of $133.1 million in 2025 and highlighted strong alignment between executive stock-based pay and shareholder returns. The filing also clarified a cash flow classification restatement, with the board concluding no incentive-based compensation recovery was required under its clawback policy.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management holds 335,897 shares in SBFG (NASDAQ: SBFG)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 335,897 shares, accounting for 5.32% of SB Financial Group Inc.'s (NASDAQ: SBFG) Common Stock as of March 31, 2026. This information was disclosed in a Schedule 13G filing, indicating Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 38,163 shares. The filing clarifies that this position reflects holdings across various Vanguard affiliates and funds, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538.
